title: teucrium polium f. majoricum
intro: Teucrium polium f. majoricum, also known as the Large Teucrium or Big Germander, is a plant species within the genus Teucrium, a group of shrubby herbs commonly found in the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include being a natural expectorant and anti-inflammatory agent, and has been employed to treat various health issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and digestive problems. The plant is rich in essential oils and flavonoids, which have been shown to possess antioxidant and antimicrobial properties, providing health benefits such as immune system support and wound healing. Teucrium polium f. majoricum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine as a poultice or applied topically to affected areas.
